mapper.select: select * from review_record where selection_id = #{selectionId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into review_record (selection_id, schedule_id, course_id, member_id, artist_id, usual_score, exam_score, total_score, grade_level, remark) values (#{selectionId}, #{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{memberId}, #{artistId}, #{usualScore}, #{examScore}, #{totalScore}, #{gradeLevel}, #{remark})
